mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews (user_id, product_id, order_id, rating, content) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{orderId}, #{rating}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.username FROM reviews r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
SELECT r.*, p.name as productName FROM reviews r LEFT JOIN products p ON r.product_id = p.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.*, u.username, p.name as productName FROM reviews r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN products p ON r.product_id = p.id WHERE r.product_id IN (SELECT id FROM products WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId}) ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE reviews SET merchant_reply = #{merchantReply} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT AVG(rating) FROM reviews WHERE product_id = #{productId}
